rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBERTA W. CHANDLER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: 1. Motion To Compel Deposition Responses 2. Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof 3. Declaration Of Gregory L. Young 4. [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel deposition responses is denied. Petitioners have not met their burden to prove that the need for the information is so compelling that it outweighs the beneficiaries' right to privacy. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than November 5, 2014, 4:00 p.m.
